# Kova Sun Shade

> Factory-direct roller blinds, venetian blinds and VertiSheer made to measure
> in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia. Bidai dan langsir tingkap untuk rumah anda —
> sehingga 40% lebih murah dari harga runcit.

Kova Sun Shade is a Malaysian window-furnishings brand based in Petaling Jaya,
Selangor. We design, manufacture and install three product lines — Roller
Blinds, Venetian Blinds and VertiSheer (vertical fabric vanes) — directly
from our workshop to the customer. No distributor, wholesaler, retailer or
showroom mark-up sits in between, which is why our pricing lands roughly 40%
below conventional showroom quotes for equivalent fabric and hardware.

Languages: English and Bahasa Malaysia. The Malay site is a full mirror at
`/bidai`, with every brochure page having a Bahasa Malaysia counterpart.
Service area: Klang Valley, Greater Kuala Lumpur, Selangor.
Founded: 2014.
Contact: info@kovasunshade.com.

## English pages

- [Home](https://kovasunshade.com/) — brand intro, hero, philosophy, collection cards.
- [Roller Blinds](https://kovasunshade.com/roller) — Roller spotlight, 13 fabrics, perfect-for, quote CTA.
- [Venetian Blinds](https://kovasunshade.com/venetian) — Venetian spotlight, scroll-driven chain·tilt·lift video, 4 finishes.
- [VertiSheer](https://kovasunshade.com/vertisheer) — VertiSheer spotlight, 5 Pivot fabrics.
- [Process](https://kovasunshade.com/process) — factory-direct narrative, philosophy, 4-step process.
- [Design yours (Configurator)](https://kovasunshade.com/configurator) — interactive product builder + side-by-side compare table + fabric library + rooms.
- [Contact](https://kovasunshade.com/contact) — quote form, studio details, hours.
- [Journal](https://kovasunshade.com/blog) — field notes, fabric studies.

## Products

### Roller Blinds (Bidai Roller)
A single sheet of fabric on a roller. Blackout, dim-out, sunscreen or
light-filtering. 13 fabric options across Cenza, Denver, Shiro, Moma and
Dernise lines. Chain / spring / motorised. Fits homes, offices, cafés,
retail.

### Venetian Blinds (Bidai Venetian)
Horizontal slats that tilt to any angle. Aluminium, timber and faux-timber
finishes. 4 W-coded options including W101 Alpine White, W301 Pearl River,
W302 Agate Grey, W206 Mahogany Teak. Mechanism: chain (tilt) + lift cord;
optional motorisation.

### VertiSheer
Vertical fabric vanes combining the softness of a curtain with the precision
of a blind. Tracks engineered for spans up to 6 metres — designed for
sliding doors, glass walls, and open-plan living rooms. 5 Pivot fabrics:
White, Silver, Beige, Ginger, Anchor.

## Brand specifics

- **Pricing positioning:** factory-direct; typically 30–40% below retail
  showroom quotes for equivalent fabric and hardware.
- **Made-to-measure:** every blind is cut and fitted to the customer's window.
- **Motorisation:** available on every model — battery, hardwired, or
  HomeKit-compatible.
- **Studio:** Petaling Jaya, Selangor. Mon–Fri 9–6, Sat by appointment.
- **Response SLA:** every enquiry answered within 48 working hours.

motorised blinds · made to measure blinds · Petaling Jaya · Klang Valley.
